title: BEM-1006 Claude result validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_external_claude_audit_result.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED_KEYS = {"audit_id", "auditor", "timestamp_utc3", "audited_evidence_refs", "decision", "findings", "blockers", "proof_ref"}
ALLOWED_DECISIONS = {"APPROVED", "PASS", "CONDITIONAL", "FAIL", "BLOCKED"}
FORBIDDEN_GPT_APPROVAL_DECISIONS = {"APPROVED", "PASS"}


def validate_audit_result(payload):
    errors = []
    missing = sorted(REQUIRED_KEYS - set(payload.keys()))
    if missing:
        errors.append({"code": "missing_required_fields", "fields": missing})
    decision = payload.get("decision")
    if decision not in ALLOWED_DECISIONS:
        errors.append({"code": "invalid_decision", "decision": decision, "allowed": sorted(ALLOWED_DECISIONS)})
    auditor = str(payload.get("auditor", "")).lower()
    if auditor in {"gpt", "chatgpt", "gpt-agent", "ai-devops-system agent"} and decision in FORBIDDEN_GPT_APPROVAL_DECISIONS:
        errors.append({"code": "self_claim_approval_forbidden", "auditor": payload.get("auditor"), "decision": decision})
    if decision in {"APPROVED", "PASS"} and "claude" not in auditor:
        errors.append({"code": "approval_must_be_external_claude", "auditor": payload.get("auditor"), "decision": decision})
    refs = payload.get("audited_evidence_refs", [])
    if not isinstance(refs, list) or not refs:
        errors.append({"code": "audited_evidence_refs_empty_or_invalid"})
    return {"ok": not errors, "errors": errors}


def main():
    sample_path = Path("governance/tests/fixtures/external_claude_audit_result_sample.json")
    if not sample_path.exists():
        result = {"ok": False, "errors": [{"code": "sample_missing", "path": str(sample_path)}]}
    else:
        result = validate_audit_result(json.loads(sample_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")))
    out = Path("governance/reports/BEM1006_EXTERNAL_CLAUDE_AUDIT_RESULT_VALIDATOR_RESULT.json")
    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return 0 if result["ok"] else 1


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
